name: spec_completeness_check
description: Validates that a spec .md file contains all required sections for its declared ticket type.

name: static_analysis_check
description: Runs mandatory static analysis bundle: ruff, mypy, bandit, vulture, import-linter, semgrep, wemake (Python); eslint + plugins (TypeScript); gdformat, gdlint (Godot); jscpd (duplication). Shadow mode only in M902; enforcement deferred to M903.

name: governance_check
description: Automated enforcement of governance rules for multi-agent handoffs across six categories: architecture (dependency direction, layer boundaries), exception safety (bare except, silent swallowing), reflection safety (getattr/setattr scoping), async safety (blocking I/O in async), observability (structured logging), governance integrity (bypass prevention). Detects 30+ rules with suppressibility mechanics.

name: planner_check
description: Detects cyclic dependencies, self-loops, and orphaned dependencies in ticket dependency graphs. Parses milestone folder for .md files with YAML-style dependencies field and runs DFS cycle detection.

name: reviewer_check
description: Scans staged git changes for new TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX/KLUDGE comments and suppressions without issue links (# noqa, # pylint, etc.). Gracefully handles unavailable git.

name: learning_check
description: Scans learning output files under project_board/checkpoints/ for forbidden phrases (hack, temporary, XXX, KLUDGE, etc.) defined by YAML policy. Prevents codifying hacks and workarounds in documented learning.

name: diff_classification
description: Classifies staged git changes into six categories (docs-only, formatting-only, lockfile-only, tests-only, migration-only, runtime-code) and recommends pipeline route.

name: formatting_check
description: Auto-formats staged code using black, ruff format, prettier, and gdformat. Re-stages formatted code and returns PASS. Non-blocking (shadow mode).

name: architecture_enforcement_check
description: Structural architecture enforcement: detects SRP violations, dependency direction violations, circular imports, duplication clusters, and complexity spikes. Orchestrates import-linter, eslint-plugin-boundaries, semgrep, jscpd, and radon with aggregated risk and architecture scoring.

name: risk_scoring_check
description: Computes weighted risk score from violation signals (SRP, architecture drift, duplication, async, migration, suppression, observability, ownership) to determine escalation need

name: semantic_extraction_check
description: Extracts focused review bundles (code hunks, imports, ownership, tests, violations) from high-risk changes for agent semantic review (Stage 6). Builds <100KB JSON bundles with dependency neighborhoods (1-2 hop imports), CODEOWNERS assignments, related test code, and violation summaries

name: agent_review_check
description: Evaluates semantic bundles (code, imports, ownership, violations) using rule-based agent logic; renders approve/warn/reject decision with confidence score. 8 signals: SRP, abstraction, hierarchy, ownership, observability, async safety, exception handling, suppression justification.

name: override_and_escalation_check
description: Validates code suppressions (# blobert-ignore-next-line) for proper justification, expiration, and escalates repeated/architecture/security bypasses for human review. Produces audit log and escalation violations.

name: security_gate_check
description: Stage 8 Final Security Gate: runs gitleaks (secrets), bandit + semgrep (Python security), pip-audit + npm audit (dependencies). Hard-fails on secrets, unsafe deserialization, auth bypass, CVSS >=7.0; soft-fails on medium/low CVEs. Shadow mode (non-blocking); enforcement deferred to M903.

name: todo_validation_check
description: Validates TodoWrite checkpoint snapshots: blocks handoff when todos attributed to the finishing agent remain in_progress.
